item.title: Democratic Rep. David Scott of Georgia dies at 80
item.description: The lawmaker, who had served in the chamber since 2003, was seeking a 13th term in his safely Democratic district.

item.title: Clearing Strait of Hormuz of mines could take 6 months, Pentagon tells Congress
item.description: The Pentagon assessment, shared in a classified briefing for lawmakers, suggests gasoline and oil prices could remain elevated through the midterm ele...

item.title: White House pushes imminent easing of controls on marijuana
item.description: Under an administration plan, marijuana would be moved to Schedule III, like some common prescription painkillers. It now has the same Schedule I clas...

item.title: Supreme Court allows soldier to sue contractor over suicide bombing
item.description: The ruling will make it easier for troops hurt in combat zones to win damages as contractors become a larger part of military operations around the wo...
